title: U.S. says it hit targets in Iran as hostilities erupt over Hormuz for third day
summary_full: Tehran said it launched strikes on U.S. interests in the Middle East, and Bahrain and Kuwait said they were targeted, as clashes continue to threaten the ceasefire.
summary_public: Tehran said it launched strikes on U.S. interests in the Middle East, and Bahrain and Kuwait said they were targeted, as clashes continue to threaten the ceasefire.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. says it hit targets in Iran as hostilities erupt
